producthunt.name: VC Boom
producthunt.tagline: Score your deck, meet investors who fit, and raise more
producthunt.description: VC Boom scores your pitch deck in under 90 seconds and tells you the single fastest fix, matches you with the right investors from 47,000+ (each with a one-line reason they fit), then drafts personalized cold emails you send from your own inbox. Prep for each investor, then book the calls. Founders using VC Boom have already raised $95M. Built by an 8-year VC who raised hundreds of millions and deployed across 47 startups. Free to start, no subscription.

producthunt.name: Google Search Profiles
producthunt.tagline: Profile for publishers/creators to highlight work on Search
producthunt.description: Google Search Profiles let publishers and creators claim a dedicated page on Search, link their social and video platforms, and get followed directly into Discover. Currently US-only, eligibility requires an existing following.

producthunt.name: Dreambeans by Google Labs
producthunt.tagline: Daily AI stories personalised from your Google apps
producthunt.description: Dreambeans synthesises your Gmail, Calendar, Photos, YouTube, and Search overnight to deliver daily AI-generated story collections. For Google AI Ultra subscribers who want personal context surfaced proactively.
